claim: The registry already encodes the three-tier discriminator workflowMode/runtimeLoopType/backendKind.
All four improvement lanes explicitly set runtimeLoopType to null; runtime-backed modes use context/research/review/council.
Advisor routing still hardcodes mode projection in Python instead of reading the registry.
TypeScript also has a hardcoded deep mode map that can drift from the registry.
The one-identity model is protected by recursive graph-metadata discovery plus skill_id==folder validation, which makes nested discoverable packets the wrong default.
Parity fixtures assert both merged skill and concrete mode, so registry-driven routing can preserve the existing observable contract.
